time.description: Durations of the event in minutes

durations.description: Durations of the event in minutes

return_time.description: Return period of the event in years

xi.description: Location parameter xi describing the Generalized Extreme Value distribution.

alpha.description: Scale parameter alpha describing the Generalized Extreme Value distribution.

theta.description: First Koutsoyiannis-Parameter theta describing the Generalized Extreme Value distribution.

eta.description: Second Koutsoyiannis-Parameter theta describing the Generalized Extreme Value distribution.

beta.description: Balancing parameter beta describing the Generalized Extreme Value distribution.

iams.description: Intensity Annual Maxima Series indicating the maximum precipitation of each year for different durations.

DDF.description: Depth-Duration-Frequency represents in a rain event the relation between rain depth, duration and return period (frequency).

Object_ID.description: Code for the object the event was selected from comprised of end date in numerical form, duration window in hours, and a running number

Event_ID.description: Code for event comprised of return period, selection parameter and running number

Area.description: Number of pixels included within event or area in 25 km²

Tmean_KOSTRA.description: Mean return period of the event

RR_Tmax.description: Precipitation rate with the maximum return period

Tmax_KOSTRA.description: Maximum return period within the event

x_center.description: Pixel number on x-axis of the event center

y_center.description: Pixel number on y-axis of the event center

x_RRmax.description: Pixel number on the x-axis of the maximum precipitation within the event

y_RRmax.description: Pixel number on the y-axis of the maximum precipitation within the event

lon_RRmax.description: Longitude of the maximum precipitation within the event

lat_RRmax.description: Latitude of the maximum precipitation within the event

MPP_flag.description: Indicator for anomalies of data, when MPP (Maximum Pixel Precipitation) was exceeded it is set to 1.
